Uses of Package
org.docgene.help.locale

  • Packages that use org.docgene.help.locale 
    Package Description
    org.docgene.help
    Contains the root classes of the docJGenerator help API.
    org.docgene.help.locale
    Contains the classes for the help localization.
    org.docgene.help.model
    Contains the model classes of the docJGenerator help API.
  • Classes in org.docgene.help.locale used by org.docgene.help 
    Class and Description
    Localization
    Hold the localization for the help.
  • Classes in org.docgene.help.locale used by org.docgene.help.locale 
    Class and Description
    Locales
    The supported locales for the help.
    LocalizationKeys
    The list of element keys used in the GUI.
  • Classes in org.docgene.help.locale used by org.docgene.help.model 
    Class and Description
    Localization
    Hold the localization for the help.
